zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hexstall於1408年出生在英國爾巴丁頓時，他的父親Richard de Hexstall II26歲，母親Anne de Grovehurst26歲。他於1434年與Margaret Bromley在英國英格蘭爾阿克頓結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年在他的家鄉享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hexstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Hexstall was born in 1408, in Baddington, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard de Hexstall II, was 26 and his mother, Anne de Grovehurst, was 26. He married Margaret Bromley in 1434, in Acton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1449, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hexstall est né en 1408, à Baddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Hexstall II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne de Grovehurst, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bromley en 1434, à Acton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1449, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Hexstall(이)가 1408년 영국 체실르 바딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Hexstall II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne de Grovehurst(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 악턴에서 Margaret Bromley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hexstall родился в 1408 г. в местности баддингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Hexstall II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Grovehurst, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bromley в 1434 г. в местности актон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1449 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год.
